prestazioni: Engine swap to a 6.4L (392ci) Apache HEMI V8 (engine code: ESF) with forged internals including Mahle Motorsport forged pistons (10.5:1 compression), Eagle Specialty Products forged H-beam connecting rods, and a Callies Compstar forged crankshaft. Paired with a custom camshaft grind from Comp Cams (280/288 duration, 0.600/0.608 lift, 114 LSA) for aggressive mid-to-high RPM power delivery.

Forced induction via a ProCharger P-1SC-1 centrifugal supercharger (8-10 psi boost) with a custom intercooler setup featuring a Bell Intercoolers 4.5" thick core (1200 CFM airflow) and Vibrant Performance 3.5" polished aluminum piping. Supporting mods include a Kenne Bell Boost-A-Pump for fuel system reinforcement and a set of ID1000x injectors from Injector Dynamics.

Suspension overhaul with a full KW Suspensions Clubsport coilover kit (3-way adjustable damping, 24-way rebound, and 16-way compression) paired with BMR Suspension's tubular front K-member and adjustable rear control arms. Chassis reinforcement includes a TMRC (Total Motor Racing Concepts) subframe connectors and a BMR strut tower brace for improved rigidity.
estetica: Widebody conversion using a Pandem Performance Stage 2 kit (front fenders, rear quarter panels, and rear bumper) with custom carbon fiber fender flares from Seibon Carbon. The kit is finished in a custom matte PPG 'Havoc Gray' with gloss black accents and a 3M satin vinyl roof wrap.

Front end aero overhaul with a custom carbon fiber splitter from Anderson Composites (3-piece design with adjustable dive planes) and a custom 3D-printed ABS rear diffuser from Maxton Design. Side skirts are replaced with a Rocket Bunny V2 kit, and the rear wing is a custom carbon fiber GT-style unit from APR Performance (GTC-300 model, 60" width, adjustable angle).

Wheel setup featuring a staggered set of Forgeline GA3R wheels (20x10.5 front, 20x12 rear) with a custom concave design, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (275/35/20 front, 315/30/20 rear). Brake system includes a full Brembo GT kit (6-piston front, 4-piston rear) with two-piece rotors (380mm front, 355mm rear) and custom red caliper paint from Dupli-Color.
